_comment: Bad case 12a — DEPARTURE_CLEARED auto-correction on takeoff (pattern). After a normal pattern departure, the ATC state must transition to PATTERN_ENTRY once the pilot is airborne for 5 seconds (auto_corrections.DEPARTURE_CLEARED.on_airborne, delay_sec: 5.0). Without the new wait_sec runner support this transition was impossible to exercise from a scenario — a silent regression window that this test closes.
name: Bad case 12a — DEPARTURE_CLEARED -> PATTERN_ENTRY after takeoff

context.callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo

say.note: Setup — taxi clearance so we reach TAXI_CLEARED on Ground
say.text: Palo Alto Ground November One Two Three Alpha Bravo at the ramp ready to taxi

say.note: Ground — 'ready for departure' pre-advances to TOWER_CONTACT (US)
say.text: Palo Alto Ground November One Two Three Alpha Bravo holding short ready for departure
Palo Alto Tower November One Two Three Alpha Bravo ready for departure

say.note: Airborne for 6 sec — on_airborne auto-correction must fire
